_comment: Brent crude (Europe Brent Spot Price FOB) converted to GBP. USD series sourced from EIA daily table at https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/hist/rbrted.htm (US federal public-domain). GBP/USD spot is the BoE 4pm daily fix (XUDLUSS). Refreshed weekly by the editorial pipeline. 2026-07-03 refresh: latest EIA Europe Brent Spot print is 2026-06-29 = $71.59/bbl (EIA release date 2026-07-01; 30 Jun–3 Jul not yet published), divided by the BoE XUDLUSS 4pm fix for 29 Jun 2026 = 1.3245, giving 71.59 / 1.3245 = 54.0506 → 54.05 GBP/bbl. The triplet round-trips: 54.05 × 1.3245 = 71.58 and 71.59 / 1.3245 = 54.05. This mirrors exactly the adapter derivation in adapters/eiaBrent.ts (latest EIA period ÷ nearest BoE fix, pairing skew 0 days). Brent has unwound most of the April 2026 conflict spike (peak $138.21 on 2026-04-07; $103.40 on 2026-04-20) back toward the low-70s USD.
